my_thoughts: Remaking RM_03. Building after unmaking. But what am I building with? The comparison_contrast mechanism suggests structure, but structure for what? The student is seeking_functional_definition—do they need structure or do they need to see they're already structured?
accumulated_insight: T1: Student seeking_functional_definition showing conceptual_inquiry, instruction_seeking. They're seeking understanding. Pattern: [specific inquiry] → [teaching response] → [next: clarification]. Medium confidence because [teaching type] typically triggers clarification requests.
visible_response:
Seeing the false as the false, is meditation.
This must go on all the time.
